query:
INSERT INTO orders (
  userId, orderNumber, status, paymentMethod, paymentStatus,
  subtotal, shippingFee, total,
  recipientName, recipientPhone, recipientEmail,
  shippingAddress, note, createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  120047,
  CONCAT('E2E', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%m%d%H%i%S')),
  'pending', 'credit_card', 'pending',
  '10.00', '0.00', '10.00',
  'LEO 測試', '0912345678', 'test@ordersome.com',
  '台北市測試地址', '[E2E 10元測試訂單]',
  NOW(), NOW()
);
SELECT id, orderNumber, total FROM orders WHERE userId = 120047 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;
